publishedAbstract: - Cannot install Lokistack **Related Articles:** [How to install LokiStack Using OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) 4.16+ using Ceph's RADOS Gateway (RGW)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7127850) [Install Ceph's RADOS Gateway (RGW) in an OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) Environment if not Already Configured](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7127851) [Configure Lifecycle Policies on Noobaa/RGW buckets](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7114687) **Note:** In ODF v4.19 Lifecycle policies can be applied via the OCP Console UI by navigating to Storage-> Object Storage-> Buckets-> [bucket-name]-> Management.
publishedTitle: How to install LokiStack Using OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) 4.16+ Using NooBaa Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG)
